license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.nk4dcyw
title: Genomic DNA extraction from cells
author: Bao Thai

steps_raw.instruction: Extract genomic DNA from cells with Quick Extract buffer (QE – Epibio #QE09050).
Centrifuge at 16K x g for 2 minutes.
Centrifuge at 16K x g for 2 minutes.
Add 100ul QE / well (24-well plates, scale up for your plate size).
Transfer to PCR tubes, 100 uL each tube.
Vortex for 15sec, centrifuge to collect liquid in bottom.
Put PCR tubes in thermocycler: 20min at 65C, 20min at 95C, store at -20C.
Measure concentration with Nanodrop. Use QE buffer as blank.
